title: A Girl of the Limberlost
description: A Girl of the Limberlost — knowledge fragments for AI agents

memes.label: About This Wiki
memes.description: A knowledge wiki for "A Girl of the Limberlost" — this page is auto-generated from book metadata

memes.label: 'Table of Contents'
memes.description: 'Table of Contents'

memes.label: Angel (the Swamp Angel)
memes.description: The Swamp Angel, wife of Freckles, who provides Elnora with fine clothing and maternal counsel during her journey from poverty to independence.

memes.label: Aunt Anna
memes.description: Philip Ammon's aunt in Chicago, who supports his relationship with Elnora and disapproves of Edith Carr.

memes.label: Belle
memes.description: Billy's younger sister, a member of the Sinton household who, along with Jimmy, forms part of the rescued children Wesley and Margaret Sinton take in.

memes.label: Billy
memes.description: A neglected boy from the Corson gang who finds food, kindness, and a new path through Elnora's compassion

memes.label: Billy Acquires a Residence at the Sintons
memes.description: Wesley Sinton takes in the orphaned street boy Billy after his father's death, and Margaret Sinton eventually accepts him as her own.

memes.label: Billy Buries His Father
memes.description: After his alcoholic father dies in a drunken sleep, young Billy attends the funeral and burial, witnessing death with a child's pragmatic understanding before beginning his new life with the Sintons.

memes.label: Billy Disciplines Margaret Sinton
memes.description: Billy steals cookies for the ailing Wesley Sinton and, when discovered, imposes self-discipline by shutting himself in a dark closet — an act that in turn disciplines Margaret's heart.

memes.label: Billy Reappears After the Tragedy
memes.description: Billy, a neglected boy from a troubled family, reappears in Elnora's life during her lunch hour, deepening her awareness of rural poverty.

memes.label: The Bird Woman
memes.description: A naturalist and photographer who becomes Elnora's mentor, purchasing her moth specimens and guiding her scientific education

memes.label: Bird Woman's Cabin
memes.description: The big red log cabin home of the Bird Woman — Elnora's mentor in moth collecting and natural science — on the outskirts of Onabasha

memes.label: Brownlee's Dry Goods Store
memes.description: The dry goods store in Onabasha owned by Mr. Brownlee — the site of Elnora's school clothes humiliation and later a place of community support

memes.label: Brushwood School
memes.description: The country school, district number nine, where Elnora Comstock completed her early education before attending the Onabasha High School.

memes.label: Catching the Yellow Emperor
memes.description: After destroying Elnora's last-needed Yellow Emperor moth in anger, Katharine Comstock spends a desperate night in the Limberlost Swamp with Pete Corson, catching moths to atone — and is rewarded with a pair of the rare Emperors, marking the turning point of her emotional transformation

memes.label: Christmas at Comstock Cabin
memes.description: Wesley Sinton's impulsive Christmas gift-giving at the Comstock cabin, where he presents Katharine Comstock with gifts intended for Elnora and a horsewhip for himself, beginning Katharine's slow emotional awakening from years of grief

memes.label: Community Support
memes.description: The network of mutual aid, generosity, and neighborly care that sustains the characters of the Limberlost — embodied by the Sintons, the Bird Woman, and others

memes.label: Comstock Attic
memes.description: Elnora Comstock's private attic bedroom in the Comstock Cabin — a long, narrow room stretching the length of the cabin where she studies, keeps her treasures, and finds refuge

memes.label: Comstock Cabin
memes.description: The Comstock family home on the edge of the Limberlost Swamp — a simple cabin that is the central domestic setting of the novel

memes.label: Comstock Garden
memes.description: The garden behind the Comstock cabin — a threshold between the domestic world and the wild Limberlost, site of many significant encounters

memes.label: Concepts & Themes
memes.description: Index of all concepts, themes, and motifs in A Girl of the Limberlost, sorted alphabetically.

memes.label: Culvert Bridge
memes.description: The bridge crossing a deep culvert at the outskirts of Onabasha where Elnora Comstock pauses on her daily school commute, leaves her lunch, and first encounters the Bird Woman.

memes.label: Dr. Ammon
memes.description: Philip Ammon's father, a Chicago physician whose advice and perspective help guide his son's decisions about love and marriage.

memes.label: Duncan
memes.description: The man who entrusted Freckles's possessions to Elnora Comstock, connecting her to the legacy of the Limberlost's former guardian.

memes.label: Edith Carr
memes.description: A wealthy Chicago socialite engaged to Philip Ammon — her possessiveness and vanity create the central romantic conflict of the novel's second half

memes.label: Edith Carr Offers a Yellow Emperor
memes.description: Edith Carr arrives on Mackinac Island and offers Elnora Comstock a Yellow Emperor moth as a gesture of reconciliation and acknowledgment of defeat in the contest for Philip Ammon's love.

memes.label: Edith Carr's Visit to the Limberlost
memes.description: Edith Carr's dramatic arrival at the Limberlost to reclaim Philip Ammon, marking the climactic confrontation of the novel's romantic triangle

memes.label: Education as Liberation
memes.description: The role of formal education as a path to personal freedom, social mobility, and self-realization in early 20th-century rural America

memes.label: Dr. Ammon Advises Philip After the Ball
memes.description: After the engagement ball disaster, Dr. Ammon counsels his son Philip, who decides to return to the Limberlost.

memes.label: Ellen Brownlee
memes.description: A kind-hearted Onabasha schoolmate — the daughter of a department store owner who becomes one of Elnora's earliest allies in town, helping her buy proper clothes and leading the picnic rescue

memes.label: Elnora Appointed Natural History Lecturer
memes.description: The Onabasha School Board appoints Elnora Comstock as Lecturer on Natural History at a salary of seven hundred fifty dollars per year, a transformative career milestone that secures her financial independence and professional identity.

memes.label: Elnora Begins Her Teaching Career
memes.description: Elnora Comstock begins her first day as Natural History Lecturer for the Onabasha schools, traveling from building to building across the city, teaching in every grade room while also leading the high school orchestra — the beginning of her professional career.

memes.label: Elnora's College Entrance Examination
memes.description: After completing high school with distinction, Elnora Comstock prepares for and takes the entrance examinations required to enter college, the final academic hurdle before realizing her long-held dream.

memes.label: Elnora Comstock
memes.description: The protagonist of A Girl of the Limberlost — a young woman who collects moths in the Limberlost Swamp to fund her education

relations.label: Elnora attends her first day of high school

memes.label: Elnora Discovers Her Father's Violin
memes.description: Elnora Comstock discovers her father Robert's violin in a repair shop, unlocking her musical heritage and setting her on the path to self-expression and social recognition

memes.label: Elnora Feeds Hungry Children
memes.description: Elnora shares her carefully packed lunch with Billy and his hungry siblings, revealing her compassionate nature and the rural poverty surrounding the Limberlost

memes.label: "Elnora's First Day of High School"
memes.description: Elnora Comstock's traumatic first day at Onabasha High School, where she faces ridicule but resolves to continue her education

memes.label: Elnora's First Moth Collection
memes.description: Elnora Comstock completes and sells her first collection of moth specimens to the Bird Woman, marking the beginning of her economic independence and her path to education.

memes.label: Elnora's High School Graduation
memes.description: Elnora Comstock's graduation from Onabasha High School, marking the culmination of four years of struggle, study, and triumph against poverty and social exclusion

memes.label: Elnora Hides Her Lunch
memes.description: Elnora conceals her lunch box under the school foundation each day, hiding her family's poverty from her classmates.

memes.label: Elnora Learns Philip Is Engaged
memes.description: Elnora Comstock discovers that Philip Ammon has been engaged to a girl at home in Chicago throughout their summer together, a revelation that devastates her and becomes a turning point in the novel's romantic plot.

memes.label: Elnora Meets Freckles and the Angel
memes.description: Elnora travels to Mackinac Island and meets Terence O'More (Freckles), the legendary former Limberlost guardian, and his wife Angel, connecting the Stratton-Porter literary universe

relations.label: Edith Carr Offers the Yellow Emperor

memes.label: Elnora Meets the Starving Children
memes.description: Elnora encounters Billy's hungry siblings Jimmy and Belle, and begins sharing her lunch with the impoverished children.

memes.label: Elnora Opens Her First Bank Account
memes.description: After her first successful sales of moth specimens and Indian artifacts, Elnora Comstock opens a bank account in Onabasha — a small act of financial independence that marks her emergence from poverty and her first step toward funding her college education

memes.label: Elnora Teaches Billy to Read
memes.description: Elnora teaches Billy to read during his residence at the Sintons' farm, passing on the gift of literacy she herself fought hard to attain.

memes.label: Elnora Travels to Mackinac
memes.description: Uncertain of Philip Ammon's heart after Edith Carr's visit to the Limberlost, Elnora Comstock journeys alone from Indiana to Mackinac Island, where she finds refuge with Freckles and Angel O'More — a journey that tests her independence and leads to the novel's climactic reunion

memes.label: Elnora Walks the Limberlost at Night
memes.description: Elnora ventures into the Limberlost swamp at night to collect the great night moths of June, overcoming her childhood fear of the dark wilderness.

memes.label: Elnora's College Dream
memes.description: Elnora Comstock's aspiration to attend college — a driving motivation that shapes her choices throughout the novel

memes.label: Elnora's Lunch Box
memes.description: The lunch box as a recurring symbol of Elnora's poverty, pride, and generosity in A Girl of the Limberlost.

memes.label: Elvira Carney
memes.description: A neighbor whose affair with Robert Comstock led to the defining tragedy of the Comstock family.

memes.label: Events
memes.description: Index of all events in A Girl of the Limberlost, sorted alphabetically.

memes.label: Featured Pages
memes.description: All featured-quality pages in A Girl of the Limberlost wiki, grouped by type.

memes.label: Forgiveness and Redemption
memes.description: The redemptive power of forgiveness as the engine of personal transformation — most powerfully demonstrated in Katharine Comstock's journey from bitterness to love

memes.label: Freckles
memes.description: Former guardian of the Limberlost Swamp whose possessions and legacy shape Elnora's journey.

memes.label: Freckles and the Angel Send Graduation Gifts
memes.description: Elnora Comstock graduates from high school and receives unexpected, magnificent gifts from Freckles and the Angel — the legendary Limberlost guardian and his wife — linking her achievement to the swamp's legacy.

memes.label: Freckles's Room
memes.description: The room in the Limberlost Swamp that Freckles left to Elnora — her base for moth collecting and a link to the novel's predecessor

memes.label: Grape Arbour
memes.description: A circular grape arbour at the Sinton farm where Elnora Comstock writes letters and shares significant moments with Philip Ammon.

memes.label: Grief and Loss
memes.description: The role of grief — particularly Katharine Comstock's unresolved mourning for her husband Robert — in shaping the emotional landscape of the novel

memes.label: Hart Henderson
memes.description: Edith Carr's devoted admirer — a wealthy young man who drives a big automobile and remains steadfastly loyal to Edith despite her treatment of him

memes.label: Hart Henderson Guards Edith Carr in Mackinac
memes.description: Hart Henderson follows Edith Carr to Mackinac Island, where he protects and cares for her as she wages an emotional battle to reconcile with her past.

memes.label: The High School Entertainment
memes.description: The Onabasha High School entertainment where Elnora Comstock performs on her father's violin — her public vindication and a turning point in her social standing

memes.label: Jimmy
memes.description: Billy's younger brother, a member of the Sinton household who, along with Belle, is among the children rescued by Wesley and Margaret Sinton.

memes.label: Katharine Comstock
memes.description: Elnora Comstock's mother — a grieving widow whose emotional thaw drives one of the novel's central arcs

memes.label: The Limberlost as Living Symbol
memes.description: The Limberlost Swamp as a multifaceted symbol — of danger and opportunity, isolation and community, death and rebirth — permeating every aspect of the novel

memes.label: The Bottomless Pool
memes.description: The pool in the Limberlost Swamp where Robert Comstock drowned — a site of tragedy and memory that haunts the Comstock family

memes.label: Limberlost Swamp
memes.description: The vast Indiana swamp that serves as the primary setting and symbol in A Girl of the Limberlost

memes.label: Limberlost Trail
memes.description: The old trail through the Limberlost swamp, used daily by Elnora Comstock and earlier by her father Robert Comstock and by Freckles.

memes.label: Love and Courtship
memes.description: The romantic relationships and courtship dynamics in the novel, centered on the triangle between Elnora Comstock, Philip Ammon, and Edith Carr

memes.label: Margaret Sinton
memes.description: Wesley Sinton's wife — a warm-hearted woman who provides Elnora with the maternal affection her own mother denies her

memes.label: Margaret Sinton Buys Elnora Clothes
memes.description: Margaret and Wesley Sinton take Elnora to Onabasha to buy proper school clothes, transforming her from a shabby country girl into a properly dressed high school student

relations.label: Elnora's disastrous first day of high school

memes.label: Margaret Sinton Reveals Robert Comstock's Death
memes.description: Margaret Sinton tells Elnora the truth about her father Robert Comstock's drowning in the Limberlost quagmire, revealing details that had been concealed for years and deepening Elnora's understanding of her family's past.

memes.label: Meeting the Bird Woman
memes.description: The pivotal meeting in Chapter III where Elnora Comstock first visits the Bird Woman, securing a buyer for her moth specimens and gaining a lifelong mentor
aliases: first visit to the Bird Woman

memes.label: Most Referenced Pages
memes.description: The most referenced pages in A Girl of the Limberlost wiki, ranked by total incoming backlinks.

memes.label: Moth Collecting
memes.description: The practice of finding, capturing, and preserving moths — central to Elnora Comstock's life and education

memes.label: Moth Cultivation
memes.description: The practice of raising caterpillars to maturity indoors, distinct from collecting wild moth specimens in the Limberlost.

memes.label: Mother-Daughter Bond
memes.description: The complex, evolving relationship between Katharine Comstock and her daughter Elnora — from emotional estrangement to deep mutual love

memes.label: Mr. Brownlee
memes.description: Ellen Brownlee's father, a dry goods merchant in Onabasha whose financial status and social position affect his daughter's standing among her schoolmates.

memes.label: Mrs. Comstock Dances in the Moonlight
memes.description: After twenty years of grief, Katharine Comstock dances in the moonlight to Elnora's violin, releasing her long-suppressed vitality in a moment of joyful abandon.

memes.label: Mrs. Comstock Enters the Limberlost
memes.description: Katharine Comstock overcomes a decade of fear and grief to enter the Limberlost at night, helping catch the rare Yellow Emperor moth for Elnora's college fund.

memes.label: Mrs. Comstock Faces the Almighty
memes.description: Katharine Comstock undergoes a profound spiritual transformation in the Limberlost, moving from bitter atheism to a direct, personal reckoning with the Almighty, culminating in her forgiveness of Elvira Carney and the burning of her late husband's possessions.

memes.label: Mrs. Comstock Makes New Clothes for Elnora
memes.description: Mrs. Comstock begins sewing proper clothes for Elnora, signaling the first thaw in her long emotional winter.

memes.label: Mrs. Comstock Experiments with Rejuvenation
memes.description: After discovering her hidden wealth at the bank, Katharine Comstock transforms her appearance — new dresses, styled hair, and rejuvenated skin — and surprises Elnora with a rented house in Onabasha.

memes.label: Mrs. Comstock's Transformation
memes.description: Katharine Comstock's gradual transformation from a grief-hardened, isolated widow into a loving mother who re-engages with life, the community, and the natural world

memes.label: Nature Study
memes.description: The practice and philosophy of learning through direct observation of the natural world — a cornerstone of Elnora's education and career

memes.label: Onabasha
memes.description: The Indiana town where Elnora attends high school — the civilized counterpoint to the Limberlost Swamp

memes.label: Onabasha Church
memes.description: The large church in Onabasha where Elnora attends services and community events — a marker of her integration into town society

memes.label: Onabasha High School
memes.description: The high school in Onabasha where Elnora Comstock pursues her education and eventually earns social acceptance through academic and musical achievement

memes.label: Onabasha Library
memes.description: The library in Onabasha where Elnora borrows books to educate herself and to interest her mother — a gateway to the wider world of learning

memes.label: Onabasha Train Station
memes.description: The railway station and depot in Onabasha, Indiana — the point of departure and arrival for the novel's characters, a threshold space marking transitions in the lives of Elnora Comstock, Philip Ammon, and Katharine Comstock

memes.label: Persons
memes.description: Index of all characters in A Girl of the Limberlost, sorted alphabetically.

memes.label: Pete Corson
memes.description: A rough-edged Limberlost swamp dweller who transforms from a lurking threat into Elnora and Mrs. Comstock's unlikely protector and helper

memes.label: Philip Ammon
memes.description: A young naturalist from Chicago who becomes Elnora's love interest after coming to the Limberlost to recover his health

memes.label: Philip Ammon's Engagement Ball
memes.description: At a grand ball at the Lake Shore Club, Philip Ammon abandons his fiancée Edith Carr to catch a Yellow Emperor moth for Elnora Comstock, leading Edith to publicly break their engagement in a scene of devastating social humiliation

memes.label: Philip Ammon Proposes in the Limberlost
memes.description: Philip Ammon kneels and proposes marriage to Elnora Comstock in the Limberlost, asking "Will you be my wife?", the romantic climax of their courtship in Chapter XXII.

memes.label: Philip Ammon Returns After the Ball
memes.description: After Edith Carr publicly breaks their engagement at a Chicago ball, Philip Ammon returns to the Limberlost to ask Elnora Comstock to marry him, but Elnora insists on a week's waiting period to be certain the break is final.

memes.label: Philip Ammon Returns to the Limberlost
memes.description: Philip Ammon's return from Chicago to the Limberlost, where he declares his love for Elnora Comstock and commits himself to life in the country she loves

memes.label: Philip Ammon Is Shown the Limberlost Violets
memes.description: Elnora Comstock leads Philip Ammon to her secret violet bed deep in the Limberlost, showing him a carpet of wild violets unmatched by any city greenhouse — a moment of shared beauty shadowed by Philip's mention of his fiancée.

memes.label: Philip Ammon's Typhoid Recovery
memes.description: Philip Ammon arrives at the Limberlost weakened by typhoid fever and is nursed back to health by Elnora Comstock, deepening their emotional bond.

memes.label: Philip Ammon Writes a Letter
memes.description: Philip Ammon writes a letter to Edith Carr from the grape arbour of the Sinton farm while Elnora Comstock dictates a playful postscript describing the Limberlost countryside, a moment that captures the unresolved romantic tension of their summer together.

memes.label: Philip Proposes at Mackinac
memes.description: Philip Ammon, recovered from typhoid fever, travels to Mackinac Island to find Elnora Comstock and propose marriage, reuniting the lovers after their separation and setting the stage for the novel's resolution

memes.label: Phoebe Simms
memes.description: A neighbor who gives Elnora Comstock peacock wing feathers, which become the centerpiece of her moth collection display.

memes.label: Places
memes.description: Index of all locations and settings in A Girl of the Limberlost, sorted alphabetically.

memes.label: Polly Ammon
memes.description: Philip Ammon's lively younger sister — engaged to Tom Levering, she is a sharp-eyed observer of the social drama between Edith Carr and Philip

memes.label: Prayer and Faith
memes.description: The role of prayer, religious faith, and divine guidance in the lives of Elnora Comstock and the characters of the Limberlost

memes.label: Pride and Dignity
memes.description: The tension between "false pride" and legitimate dignity in Elnora Comstock's character, and the novel's exploration of self-respect as a poor girl's armor

memes.label: Professor Henley
memes.description: The superintendent of Onabasha High School who helps Elnora Comstock secure her tuition and books.

memes.label: Robert Comstock
memes.description: Elnora's father and Katharine Comstock's husband, whose death in the Limberlost swamp shapes the family's struggles.

memes.label: Rural and Urban Life
memes.description: The contrast between rural Limberlost country, the town of Onabasha, and the city of Chicago — and how Elnora navigates these three worlds

memes.label: Sacrifice
memes.description: The recurring theme of characters giving up their own desires, comfort, and security for the sake of others — the ultimate expression of love in the moral world of the Limberlost

memes.label: Sadie Reed
memes.description: A classmate at Onabasha High School who participates in the mockery of Elnora Comstock's clothing and hat.

memes.label: Secrets and Truth
memes.description: The role of secrets — particularly the truth of Robert Comstock's death — and the transformative power of truth-telling and revelation in the novel

memes.label: Sinton Barn
memes.description: The barn on the Sinton Farm where Wesley Sinton works, keeps his animals, and has important private conversations — a place of labor, counsel, and quiet intimacy

memes.label: Sinton Farm
memes.description: The farm of Wesley and Margaret Sinton, nearest neighbors to the Comstocks and a place of refuge and kindness for Elnora

memes.label: Sleepy Snake Creek
memes.description: A creek flowing through the Limberlost swamp near the Comstock property, where Elnora fishes for trout and hunts moths with Philip Ammon.

memes.label: Social Class and Appearance
memes.description: The role of clothing, wealth, and social standing in shaping characters' experiences and interactions in early 20th-century rural Indiana

memes.label: Spring House
memes.description: The spring house on the Comstock property used for cold food storage, with a loft where old equipment and lanterns were kept.

memes.label: The Bird Woman Becomes Elnora's Patron
memes.description: The process by which the Bird Woman evolves from a one-time specimen buyer into Elnora Comstock's long-term patron and mentor, providing financial support, scientific education, and emotional encouragement

memes.label: Tom Levering
memes.description: Polly Ammon's good-natured fiancé — a loyal friend to Philip Ammon who navigates the social drama between Edith Carr and Elnora with humor and integrity

memes.label: Uncle Doc
memes.description: The town physician of Onabasha, referred to affectionately as "Uncle Doc," who provides medical care to the community around the Limberlost.

memes.label: The Violin
memes.description: The violin that belonged to Elnora's deceased father Robert Comstock — a symbol of inherited talent, connection across generations, and Elnora's path to social acceptance

memes.label: Violin Concert at Comstock Cabin
memes.description: The evening in Chapter XXI when Elnora plays her father's violin at the Comstock cabin for the Sintons and Philip Ammon, her music expressing the emotional depth that words cannot, and marking a turning point in her relationship with Philip

memes.label: Wesley Sinton
memes.description: The Comstock family's kind-hearted neighbor — a farmer who becomes Elnora's steadfast protector and surrogate father

memes.label: Wesley Sinton Confronts Mrs. Comstock
memes.description: Wesley Sinton confronts Katharine Comstock over her neglect of Elnora's needs, setting in motion the events that enable Elnora to attend high school.

memes.label: Womanhood and Gender Roles
memes.description: The novel's exploration of womanhood, gender expectations, and Elnora Comstock's challenge to conventional roles for women in early 20th-century Indiana

memes.label: Work Ethic and Self-Reliance
memes.description: The centrality of hard work and personal independence as moral virtues and practical necessities in the world of the Limberlost
